name: Vanquish Soul Calamity Caesar
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＶＳ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヴァンキッシュ・ソウル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍帝ノ槍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カラミティ・カイザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When an opponent's Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated that targets a card(s) you control, while you control a "Vanquish Soul" monster: Negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card, then you can inflict damage to your opponent equal to the ATK of 1 "Vanquish Soul" monster you control. You can only activate 1 "Vanquish Soul Calamity Caesar" per turn.
eff: When an opponent's Spell/Trap Card, or monster effect, is activated that targets a card(s) you control, while you control a "Vanquish Soul" monster: Negate the activation, and if you do, destroy that card, then you can inflict damage to your opponent equal to the ATK of 1 "Vanquish Soul" monster you control. You can only activate 1 "Vanquish Soul Calamity Caesar" per turn.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
